name: BB:Threats: Port Scans: UDP Port Scan
notes: This Building Block identifies UDP based port scans.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Port Scans: UDP Port Scan on flows which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following UDP
when the flow type is one of Superflow C
when the flow matches Application is any of Misc.Unknown_UDP
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Port Scans: UDP Port Scan on flows which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following UDP
AND when the flow type is one of Superflow C
AND when the flow matches Application is any of Misc.Unknown_UDP
